title: HR&Administrator
description:
Are you a detail-oriented and organized individual looking for an exciting opportunity to contribute to a dynamic team? We're seeking an Office Administrator to join our growing company and help ensure smooth day-to-day operations.


Responsibilities:

  • 1. Full-Cycle Recruitment Management: Oversee the entire recruitment lifecycle, including job posting, candidate sourcing, interviewing, shortlisting, offer negotiation, and onboarding coordination to attract and secure top talent.
  • 2. Employee Lifecycle Support: Assist with key employee movements—onboarding new hires, facilitating offboarding procedures, and coordinating internal transfers—to ensure seamless transitions.
  • 3. HR Compliance & Records: Maintain accurate HR records and employee data; support HR policy implementation and ensure strict adherence to Singapore’s employment regulations (MOM guidelines).
  • 4. Culture & Stakeholder Collaboration: Organize employee engagement activities to promote positive corporate culture; collaborate with hiring managers to understand manpower needs and provide recruitment updates.
  • 5. Ad-Hoc HR Initiatives: Contribute to HR projects (e.g., process optimization, policy reviews) to enhance team productivity and employee experience.
  • 1. Data & Financial Coordination: Perform daily data entry and verification; conduct daily bank reconciliations and communicate with internal teams to ensure account accuracy; collaborate with the sales admin assistant to prepare statements.
  • 2. Administrative Support: Handle routine office tasks efficiently, including document filing, office supply management, and meeting coordination, to support smooth day-to-day operations.
  • 3. Ad-Hoc Administrative Duties: Undertake additional tasks assigned by the immediate supervisor to meet team and company operational needs.

Qualifications:

  • Previous experience in office administration or a related field preferred
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
  • Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities, with a keen attention to detail
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment
  • Positive attitude, with a willingness to take on new challenges and responsibilities
  • Diploma equivalent and above, or equivalent experience preferred

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary+Performance Bonus
  • Health insurance and medical coverage
  • Paid time off and holidays
  • Professional development opportunities

Others:

  • Work Location: Bukit Batok
  • Work Time: 9:00 ~18:00, Monday to Friday (Exl. PH)

If you're ready to take on a diverse and rewarding role as an Office Administrator and be part of a supportive team environment, we'd love to hear from you! Apply now with your resume sending to hr@viskou.com

postedCompany.description:
Established in 2008, VISKOU swiftly solidified its position as a highly successful multi-brand distributor of electronic surveillance products. We proudly serve as the authorized distributor for HIKVISION in Singapore.


VISKOU has emerged as a leading distributor of security products, distinguished by our unwavering dedication to excellence. We've made substantial investments in nurturing our sales and technical teams, positioning them as exemplars of top-tier service for our esteemed clientele.


As an innovative and forward-thinking corporation, VISKOU has forged an outstanding reputation within the security industry. We proudly hold the title of an authorized distributor for esteemed brands in the security and electronics sector, including renowned names like HIKVISION and UTEPO.


At VISKOU, we provide a comprehensive range of professional services encompassing project proposal development and tender design. We commit to being your enduring, reliable, and steadfast partner in the long run, ensuring that your security requirements are consistently met with excellence.


Why join us?


When you join Viskou, you're not just starting a job; you're embarking on a journey of professional development and personal growth. We invest in our employees through ongoing training, mentorship programs, and clear paths for advancement.


We aim to be the best company to work for, because we treat every employee just like our family. Our commitment to work-life balance means you can excel in your career while enjoying time with your loved ones. Our diverse and inclusive workplace encourages collaboration, creativity, and fresh perspectives.


Join us in making a meaningful impact in CCTV and security field. Discover the opportunities, benefits, and supportive community that await you at Viskou. Take the first step towards a fulfilling career; explore our current openings and join our team today!
postedCompany.name: VISKOU SYSTEM PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
